headline: Genuine Parts (GPC) Expects Split to Close in 9-12 Months
summary: Genuine Parts Co. (NYSE:GPC) is among the 10 best non-tech stocks to buy and hold for 5 years. On March 11, Genuine Parts Co. (NYSE:GPC) CEO Will Stengel said that the company expects the ongoing split of its automotive and motion businesses into two independent entities to be completed within 9 to 12 months. Speaking […]
